__fixture__.name: admin_audit_org_switch_degraded_into_local
__fixture__.scenario: Neither the managed nor the self-hosted control plane is reachable. The install degrades to account_free_local while preserving local workspace, local Git, local tasks, and BYOK AI capability. The admin-audit packet records an org_switch with decision_reason_class org_switch_degraded_into_local and an account_boundary target.
contract_sections: Admin-audit packet row anatomy / Event taxonomy
What the seed guarantees / Local-core use remains inspectable and non-blocking

decision_reason_note: Both the managed and the customer-operated identity planes are unreachable. The install degrades to account_free_local while local workspace, local Git, local tasks, and BYOK AI continue.

tenant_scope.scope_note: Tenant binding temporarily unbound while the degraded window is active; upgrade path back to self_hosted_org remains reversible.

actor_ref.actor_note: Automated degrade triggered by control-plane unreachability.

target_refs.target_label: Account boundary transitioning from managed to local
target_refs.target_note: Boundary narrows visibly; desktop-core capabilities stay available.

before_after_state.transition_note: Desktop-core capabilities remain invariant across the transition. Managed and self-hosted surfaces render their narrowed state with visible recovery.

policy_bundle_links.link_note: Bundle retained on disk as the last-known-good narrowing; inspectable in the degraded state.

entitlement_snapshot_links.link_note: Snapshot retained on disk; consulted to render narrowed managed features honestly.

signer_identity.signing_scope_note: Build-preload signer is authoritative for the degraded local posture while remote signers are unreachable.

distribution_statuses.note: Admin-audit row recorded locally while the control plane is unreachable; will fan out to the managed audit stream once connectivity returns.

locally_inspectable_fields: Tenant-scope transition from bound to unbound.
Policy and entitlement epoch at the time of the degrade.
Distribution row proving the event was recorded locally.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: Degrade is explained from the packet alone; no vendor console is required to show why the install narrowed and what still works locally.
